name: Adam Makowicz
abstract: Adam Makowicz (born Adam Matyszkowicz; 18 August 1940) is a Polish pianist and composer living in New York. He performs jazz and classical piano pieces, as well as his own compositions.

about_quotes.speaker: Paquito D'Rivera
about_quotes.evidence: Dexter Gordon used to live there and Adam Makowicz, the pianist. A lot of musicians used to live there.
